productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Miami II Black Cream Flip Flop
description: Chill out in style with the Miami II series of funky flip-flops from puma. With its soft footbed and strong gripped outsole, the journey in this footwear will be an assured awesome one.Upper Fabric upper for dry comfort of the feet Thong straps with stitch detailing and padded inner Dual-toned thong straps in beige and black Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort puma cat logo on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
